mapper.select: SELECT ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ri.apartment_id, ri.is_deleted, ri.create_time, ri.update_time, lt.id lease_term_id, lt.month_count, lt.unit, lt.create_time lease_term_create_time, lt.update_time lease_term_update_time, lt.is_deleted lease_term_is_deleted FROM room_info ri LEFT JOIN room_lease_term rlt ON rlt.room_id= ri.id left JOIN lease_term lt ON rlt.lease_term_id= lt.id WHERE ri.is_deleted=0 AND ri.id=#{id}
